tools.name: billingAccounts.billingbudgetsBillingAccountsBudgetsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new budget. See [Quotas and limits](https://cloud.google.com/billing/quotas) for more information on the limits of the number of budgets you can create.

tools.name: billingAccounts.billingbudgetsBillingAccountsBudgetsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a budget. Returns successfully if already deleted.

tools.name: billingAccounts.billingbudgetsBillingAccountsBudgetsGet
tools.description: Returns a budget. WARNING: There are some fields exposed on the Google Cloud Console that aren't available on this API. When reading from the API, you will not see these fields in the return value, though they may have been set in the Cloud Console.

tools.name: billingAccounts.billingbudgetsBillingAccountsBudgetsList
tools.description: Returns a list of budgets for a billing account. WARNING: There are some fields exposed on the Google Cloud Console that aren't available on this API. When reading from the API, you will not see these fields in the return value, though they may have been set in the Cloud Console.

tools.name: billingAccounts.billingbudgetsBillingAccountsBudgetsPatch
tools.description: Updates a budget and returns the updated budget. WARNING: There are some fields exposed on the Google Cloud Console that aren't available on this API. Budget fields that are not exposed in this API will not be changed by this method.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
